title: Configuring Google Drive Settings
description: Learn how to connect your Google Drive folder so AtlusDeck can store generated decks automatically.

steps.narration: Let's configure your Google Drive connection. The settings page is your hub for managing integrations, deck structures, and agent configurations.
Here are your Drive settings. Right now no folder is selected, so AtlusDeck doesn't have a place to save your generated decks. Let's fix that.
Click Choose Folder to open the Google Drive picker and select your root folder. This is where AtlusDeck will store all your generated decks.

callout.text: Click here to open the Drive folder picker.

steps.narration: After selecting your folder in the Drive picker, the settings save automatically. Let's go back to the Drive page to confirm.
Your folder is now set to AtlusDeck Proposals. All generated decks, talk tracks, and other deal artifacts will be organized under this folder automatically.
That's all there is to it. Your Drive connection is ready and AtlusDeck will handle file storage from here. Explore other settings to customize your workspace.
